creator: feld@FreeBSD.org
text:
Here's more verbose info that I get from x86info

x86info v1.30.  Dave Jones 2001-2011
Feedback to <davej@redhat.com>.

MP Table:
#	APIC ID	Version	State		Family	Model	Step	Flags
#	 0	 0x10	 BSP, usable	 20	 2	 0	 0x178bfbff
#	 1	 0x10	 AP, usable	 20	 2	 0	 0x178bfbff

Found 2 identical CPUs
Extended Family: 5 Extended Model: 0 Family: 15 Model: 2 Stepping: 0
CPU Model (x86info's best guess): Unknown CPU

PowerNOW! Technology information
Available features:
	Temperature sensing diode present.
	Thermal Trip
	Thermal Monitoring
	Software Thermal Control
	100MHz multiplier control
	Hardware P-state control
	invariant TSC
	Effective Frequency Interface

Something went wrong reading MSR_PSTATE_CUR_LIMIT

SVM: revision 1, 8 ASIDs, np, lbrVirt, SVMLock, NRIPSave, PauseFilter
Address Size: 48 bits virtual, 36 bits physical
The physical package has 2 of 2 possible cores implemented.
